headline: Forget Expedia: This Unstoppable Monopoly Is a Far Smarter Bet
summary: Expedia Group (NASDAQ:EXPE) is back in the spotlight after a 42.34% Q1 adjusted EPS beat and a freshly minted $5 billion buyback authorization that has the travel-rebound crowd piling back in. But here’s what you should actually be watching: FedEx (NYSE:FDX), the irreplaceable logistics monopoly quietly compounding while everyone else chases hotel bookings. The Case ... headline: FedEx Freight Spin Off Prompts Fresh Look At FedEx Valuation
summary: FedEx has completed the spin-off of FedEx Freight as an independent, publicly traded company focused on the North American LTL sector. The transaction separates FedEx's core parcel and express operations from its LTL freight business into two distinct listed companies. For investors watching NYSE:FDX, this move comes with the stock trading at $411.75 and showing a 40.5% return year to date and 93.2% over the past year. The separation of FedEx Freight puts more attention on the remaining...

headline: FedEx trucking hub expansion in Netherlands aids new air cargo strategy
summary: FedEx is investing $54 million to add capacity at its Netherlands trucking hub to keep up with growing transport demand in Europe and enable easier connections to its air cargo network. headline: FedEx Completes Spin-Off of FedEx Freight
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 01, 2026--FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX, "FedEx") today announced the completion of its spin-off of FedEx Freight Holding Company, Inc. (NYSE: FDXF, "FedEx Freight"), establishing FedEx Freight as an independent, publicly traded company and focused leader in the North American less-than-truckload (LTL) industry.
